dict.parameter:
$(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE) CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleInfoDictionaryVersion 6.0 CFBundleName Murmur CFBundlePackageType $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_PACKAGE_TYPE) CFBundleShortVersionString $(MARKETING_VERSION) CFBundleVersion $(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION) LSUIElement
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription Murmur requires microphone access to transcribe your speech to text. NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription Murmur uses on-device speech recognition to convert your voice to text privately and securely. NSAppleEventsUsageDescription Murmur requires permission to register global hotkeys for quick access to speech transcription. NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription Murmur captures system audio to transcribe meeting participants and other audio playing on your Mac.
